# kUSBInformationDeviceIsCaptiveBit

**Enumeration Case**

The USB device has directly attached to its hub and isn’t removable.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsCaptiveBit = 0
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsCaptiveBit
